entity: John Stockton career total assists = 15,806 (BBR all-time leader); warehouse sum from agg_player_season currently undercounts at 15,442 (delta 364, ~2.4%)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_ast * gp)) AS career_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 304 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse SUM(avg_ast*gp) is 15,442 but BBR's career regular-season assist total is 15,806. The 364-assist gap suggests agg_player_season is missing data from one or more of Stockton's 19 seasons or a per-season row is missing assists. Promoting to stable requires the warehouse ETL to add the missing rows. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
